user.title: School Day?
user.description: Add a school name and one or more ICS calendar URLs. Optional school-year ranges are one per line, formatted like `2025-08-12 to 2026-05-22`.

error.no_urls: Add at least one ICS calendar URL.
error.invalid_school_years: School-year ranges must be formatted like `2025-08-12 to 2026-05-22`, one per line.
